Updated 15 May 2026

Sub-processors

Written correspondence: Tamazia Ltd, 124 City Road, London, EC1V 2NX.

This page lists the sub-processors engaged by Tamazia in the delivery of its services. Changes to this list are notified to the controller no less than thirty days in advance under clause 6 of the Data Processing Agreement.

NamePurposeCountry of processingTransfer instrument
Cloudflare, Inc. Edge delivery, CF Workers, KV storage, Web Analytics, Email Routing, Pages hosting, Turnstile United States · United Kingdom · India · Singapore UK IDTA + EU SCC
Resend Co. Transactional email (auto-acknowledgement and internal alerts and DSAR confirmation) United States UK IDTA + EU SCC
Cal.com, Inc. Booking and scheduling management United States · Germany UK IDTA + EU SCC + EEA establishment in Germany
Postmark DMARC report aggregation United States UK IDTA + EU SCC
Google LLC Analytics (consent-gated), Postmaster Tools, Search Console United States UK IDTA + EU SCC + UK Extension to EU-US Data Privacy Framework
Microsoft Corporation Bing Webmaster Tools, SNDS reputation United States UK IDTA + EU SCC + UK Extension to EU-US Data Privacy Framework
ZeroBounce LLC Email validation prior to persistence United States UK IDTA + EU SCC
Hunter SAS Email validation prior to persistence France EEA establishment
NeverBounce, Inc. Email validation prior to persistence United States UK IDTA + EU SCC
GitHub, Inc. Source repository, CI build for static deployment United States UK IDTA + EU SCC + UK Extension to EU-US Data Privacy Framework
Bigrock Solutions Ltd Domain registrar for tamazia.in India UK SCC + Indian DPDPA 2023 cross-reference

Notification

To receive sub-processor change notices, write to dpo@tamazia.co.uk with the subject line "Sub-processor notice list" and the email used for the notification register.

Cookies, with your consent.

Strictly necessary cookies run the site; optional analytics only with your consent. Cookie policy · Global Privacy Control detected and honoured.

From £2,500/month · 90 day rolling Book a strategy call
